description:
Make spawn's fz_spawn_thunk wrapper dispatch through the typed closure stub baked at the spawn callsite.

## What

`src/ir_lower.rs:710-724` wraps `Builtin(Spawn, [closure_arg])` in `MakeClosure(fz_spawn_thunk, [arg])`. Post-.29.12.2, that MakeClosure resolves to a typed SpecId of fz_spawn_thunk specialized for the wrapped closure's Descr. Post-.29.12.3, that stub dispatches to the typed body.

This ticket: verify the existing path Just Works after .29.12.2/.3 land, OR fix anywhere fz_spawn_thunk lowering still presumes any-key. Specifically:
- Confirm fz_spawn_thunk's body (`TailCallClosure(c, [])`) gets typed through the closure ABI.
- Confirm fz_spawn runtime helper (`runtime/src/ir_runtime.rs:97-108`) passes the typed closure bits through scheduler_hooks::dispatch_spawn unchanged.

If something presumes any-key (e.g., a hardcoded SpecId.0 == FnId.0 lookup for fz_spawn_thunk), fix it.

## Tests (TDD)

- Spawn a closure that closes over typed data. Verify spawned task runs the narrow body (counter/printf fingerprint).
- Existing spawn tests stay green.

## Risk

This may turn out to be a no-op (typed closure dispatch transparently covers it). If so, close with a comment documenting the verification.
title: Spawn ABI dispatches via typed stub
